ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Reference to work class of the individual */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight, a measure of the importance of the individual in the dataset */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Reference to education level */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number representing the education level */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to marital status */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to occupation */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Reference to relationship status */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to race */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Average hours worked per week */,
  "native_country" INTEGER /* Reference to native country */,
  "income_bracket" INTEGER /* Reference to income bracket */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "employment_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to employment status of the individual */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry in which the individual is employed */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_employment_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("employment_status_id") REFERENCES employment_statuses ("employment_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_native_country FOREIGN KEY ("native_country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES educations ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_income_bracket FOREIGN KEY ("income_bracket") REFERENCES income_brackets ("income_bracket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work class */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the work class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the work class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the education level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the marital status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the occupation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship status */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the relationship status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the race */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_brackets" (
  "income_bracket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income bracket */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Name of the income bracket */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the income bracket */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_bracket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group represented in the summary */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income for the age group */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Count of individuals in the age group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the summary was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the summary was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "total_employed" INTEGER /* Total number of employed individuals */,
  "total_unemployed" INTEGER /* Total number of unemployed individuals */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate calculated as a percentage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the statistic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the statistic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_statuses" (
  "employment_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status */,
  "employment_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the employment status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)
